creator: bartsch@dssgmbh.de
text:
after adding the line:    DISABLE_MAKE_JOBS=yes
to /etc/make.conf the compilation continues and completes without any 
further error.
Up to now I did not notice any side effects after installing.
IMHO there seems to be sth. wrong with default settings.
-- 
Mit freundlichem Gruß
Alfred Bartsch

mailto:bartsch@dssgmbh.de
